_comment: 소아과언니 첫 production 토픽 — '열나는 아이, 옷 벗기지 마세요'. 팔레트 B (Medical Teal, 응급 카테고리) · 패턴 A (통념 깨기 + 메커니즘 + 올바른 대처 4 + 응급 신호). 모든 본문 슬라이드는 sources.json claims 와 1:1 매핑.
common_style: Instagram carousel slide design, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350 px). Magazine editorial style, calm clinical light minimalist for pediatric emergency content. Layout: left-aligned, magazine-style, 14px vertical accent bar at left edge in #2C6E63, generous whitespace (60%+ empty area), Pretendard Korean typography (900 headline / 700 sub / 400 body). Headline rule: only the LAST word in accent color #2C6E63, others in primary text color #0E1B2C. Bottom fixed footer: trust badge "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" in #6B7B8C + slide indicator like "03 / 09" in #6B7B8C. Tone: 전문의의 신뢰 + 동네 언니의 친근함 (calm, trustworthy, restrained — palette B is for higher-stakes emergency topics). NO emoji except ✓ and ❤️. NO stock-photo people, NO doctor-in-white-coat clichés, NO red-flag fear-mongering imagery (no scary thermometer close-ups with red numbers).

slides.prompt: COVER SLIDE for dr.soa_unnie carousel "열나는 아이, 옷 벗기지 마세요". 1080x1350 px, light medical magazine style. Background: #F8F8F5. Left edge: 14px vertical accent bar #2C6E63. Top-left small uppercase label (Pretendard 700, #2C6E63): "@dr.soa_unnie · 응급 가이드 · No.01". Lower-left bold Korean headline 3 lines (Pretendard 900, ~108px): "열나는 아이" (text #0E1B2C), "옷 벗기지" (text #0E1B2C), "마세요." (last word "마세요" in accent #2C6E63). Subline (Pretendard 400, #6B7B8C, ~36px): "체온이 오히려 더 오를 수 있어요." Visual element: a single thin minimalist line-art icon at upper-right area — folded baby blanket outline (no full illustration), accent stroke #2C6E63 1.5px, very small (~120px). Top 50% empty for breathing room, generous whitespace, magazine breathing room, left-aligned. Bottom footer: "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" + "01 / 09" in #6B7B8C. Use exact Korean spelling "열나는" "옷 벗기지" "마세요".

BODY SLIDE 02 — Common Misconception. 1080x1350 px. Background #F8F8F5. Left 14px accent bar #2C6E63. Top-left uppercase label (Pretendard 700, #2C6E63): "흔한 오해 · MYTH". Korean headline (Pretendard 900, ~88px): "옷 벗기면" (text #0E1B2C), "시원해진다는" (text #0E1B2C), "오해." (last word "오해" in accent #2C6E63). Visual element: a single horizontal comparison bar — left side gray label "❌ 옷 다 벗기기" (#6B7B8C box outline 1.5px), right side gray label "❌ 두껍게 감싸기" (#6B7B8C box outline 1.5px), with a thin teal connector showing "둘 다 권장 X" (#2C6E63) in the middle. Caption (Pretendard 400, #6B7B8C, ~32px) below visual: "NICE 가이드라인은 발열 아동을 옷을 적게 입히거나 과하게 감싸는 것 모두 권장하지 않습니다." Generous whitespace, left-aligned, magazine feel. Bottom footer: "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" + "02 / 09" in #6B7B8C. Use exact Korean spelling "오해" "권장".

BODY SLIDE 03 — Mechanism (the medical truth). 1080x1350 px. Background #F8F8F5. Left 14px accent bar #2C6E63. Top-left uppercase label (Pretendard 700, #2C6E63): "의학적 진실 · WHY". Korean headline (Pretendard 900, ~84px): "갑자기 벗기면" (text #0E1B2C), "체온이 더" (text #0E1B2C), "올라가요." (last word "올라가요" in accent #2C6E63). Visual element: a vertical 3-step flow diagram (each step a small rounded rectangle outline #2C6E63 1.5px with short Korean label inside, connected by thin downward arrows #6B7B8C): step 1 "갑작스런 냉각" → step 2 "오한·근육 떨림" → step 3 "심부체온 ↑ 상승". Below diagram, caption (Pretendard 400, #6B7B8C, ~30px) two short lines: "근육이 떨면서 열을 더 만들어요." / "발열 처치의 1차 목표는 체온을 정상으로 낮추는 것이 아니라 아이의 편안함을 개선하는 것입니다." Generous whitespace, left-aligned. Bottom footer: "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" + "03 / 09" in #6B7B8C.

BODY SLIDE 04 — Right Response 01: Room environment. 1080x1350 px. Background #F8F8F5. Left 14px accent bar #2C6E63. Top-left uppercase label (Pretendard 700, #2C6E63): "올바른 대처 01". Korean headline (Pretendard 900, ~88px): "실내는 쾌적," (text #0E1B2C), "옷은 한" (text #0E1B2C), "겹." (last word "겹" in accent #2C6E63). Visual element: a clean two-row icon row at center — row A shows a small house outline icon (#2C6E63 1.5px) with text "22~24°C" (Pretendard 700, #0E1B2C, ~44px) next to it; row B shows a small folded shirt outline icon (#2C6E63 1.5px) with text "얇은 옷 한 겹 + 얇은 이불" (#0E1B2C, ~38px). Below, caption (Pretendard 400, #6B7B8C, ~30px): "떨면 한 겹 더, 땀나면 한 겹 빼기 — 너무 적게도 너무 많이도 안 돼요." Generous whitespace, left-aligned, magazine feel. Bottom footer: "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" + "04 / 09" in #6B7B8C. Use exact Korean spelling "실내" "한 겹".

BODY SLIDE 05 — Right Response 02: Cold/alcohol/sponging caution. 1080x1350 px. Background #F8F8F5. Left 14px accent bar #2C6E63. Top-left uppercase label (Pretendard 700, #2C6E63): "올바른 대처 02". Korean headline (Pretendard 900, ~88px): "찬물·알코올은" (text #0E1B2C), "절대" (text #0E1B2C), "금지." (last word "금지" in accent #2C6E63). Visual element: a vertical 3-row do-not checklist — each row has a small thin × mark icon (#6B7B8C 1.5px) on the left and Korean text on the right (Pretendard 700, #0E1B2C, ~40px): row 1 "찬물 마사지", row 2 "알코올로 닦기", row 3 "미온수 스폰지 (NICE 비권장)". The third row label "NICE 비권장" rendered in small accent #2C6E63 (Pretendard 400, ~26px) as a tag next to the row. Below, caption (Pretendard 400, #6B7B8C, ~28px, 2 lines): "떨림과 불편을 유발해 오히려 체온이 오를 수 있어요." / "해열제 후 답답해 할 때만 미지근한 물로 가볍게." Generous whitespace, left-aligned. Bottom footer: "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" + "05 / 09" in #6B7B8C. Use exact Korean spelling "알코올" "미온수" "비권장".

BODY SLIDE 06 — Right Response 03: Hydration. 1080x1350 px. Background #F8F8F5. Left 14px accent bar #2C6E63. Top-left uppercase label (Pretendard 700, #2C6E63): "올바른 대처 03". Korean headline (Pretendard 900, ~88px): "가장 중요한 건" (text #0E1B2C), "수분" (text #0E1B2C), "공급." (last word "공급" in accent #2C6E63). Visual element: a horizontal icon row of 4 small thin line-art glyphs (#2C6E63 1.5px stroke), each ~80px, evenly spaced: bottle (모유·분유) / cup (물) / pouch (전해질 음료) / drop. Below the icon row, a short 2-item dehydration check list (Pretendard 700, #0E1B2C, ~36px) with small teal check marks: "✓ 소변 횟수 줄지 않는지" / "✓ 입술·혀가 마르지 않는지". Below, caption (Pretendard 400, #6B7B8C, ~30px): "한 번에 많이 X — 자주 조금씩 권장." Generous whitespace, left-aligned. Bottom footer: "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" + "06 / 09" in #6B7B8C. Use exact Korean spelling "수분" "공급" "전해질".

BODY SLIDE 07 — Right Response 04: Antipyretic dosing by weight. 1080x1350 px. Background #F8F8F5. Left 14px accent bar #2C6E63. Top-left uppercase label (Pretendard 700, #2C6E63): "올바른 대처 04". Korean headline (Pretendard 900, ~84px): "해열제는" (text #0E1B2C), "체중" (text #0E1B2C), "기준." (last word "기준" in accent #2C6E63). Visual element: a clean compact 2-column dosing table (thin #6B7B8C 1px borders, white-tint cells), 3 rows: header row in accent (#2C6E63 background, #F8F8F5 text, Pretendard 700) — "성분 / 용량 · 간격". Row 1 — left cell "아세트아미노펜" (#0E1B2C, Pretendard 700, ~36px), right cell "10~15 mg/kg · 4~6시간" (#0E1B2C, ~32px). Row 2 — left "이부프로펜 (6개월↑)" (#0E1B2C, ~36px), right "5~10 mg/kg · 6~8시간" (#0E1B2C, ~32px). Below table, a small accent-bordered note box (#2C6E63 1px outline, ~12px padding) with text (Pretendard 700, #0E1B2C, ~28px): "두 약 교차·병용은 일상적으로 권장 X." Caption (Pretendard 400, #6B7B8C, ~26px) below: "체중을 곱하면 정확한 1회 용량." Generous whitespace, left-aligned. Bottom footer: "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" + "07 / 09" in #6B7B8C. Use exact Korean spelling "아세트아미노펜" "이부프로펜" "체중" "교차" "병용".

BODY SLIDE 08 — Emergency Red Flags. 1080x1350 px. Background #F8F8F5. Left 14px accent bar #2C6E63. Top-left uppercase label (Pretendard 700, #2C6E63): "즉시 병원 · RED FLAGS". Korean headline (Pretendard 900, ~88px): "하나라도" (text #0E1B2C), "해당하면" (text #0E1B2C), "119." (last word "119" in accent #2C6E63). Visual element: a vertical short red-flag checklist — 5 rows, each row prefixed with a small accent-color filled square dot (#2C6E63, ~14px) and Korean text (Pretendard 700, #0E1B2C, ~36px): row 1 "3개월 미만 · 38°C 이상 발열", row 2 "5분 이상 지속되는 경련", row 3 "의식 저하 · 축 늘어짐", row 4 "눌러도 사라지지 않는 점상 발진", row 5 "호흡곤란 · 가쁜 숨". A thin accent border (#2C6E63 1px) frames the entire checklist box to visually distinguish this red-flag slide. Below, caption (Pretendard 400, #6B7B8C, ~28px): "단순 열성경련은 6~60개월에 흔하지만, 5분 이상이면 즉시 의료 평가." Generous whitespace, left-aligned. Bottom footer: "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" + "08 / 09" in #6B7B8C. Use exact Korean spelling "경련" "의식" "점상 발진" "호흡곤란".

OUTRO SLIDE with SOURCE BOX (mandatory). 1080x1350 px. Background #F8F8F5. Left 14px accent bar #2C6E63. Top-left uppercase label (Pretendard 700, #2C6E63): "SAVE & SHARE". Korean headline (Pretendard 900, ~92px): "열날 때" (text #0E1B2C), "꺼내" (text #0E1B2C), "보세요." (last word "보세요" in accent #2C6E63). Below headline: SOURCE BOX with thin border (#6B7B8C 1px) and slightly darker background tint (#EFEFEC), ~24px padding — small uppercase label "출처" (#6B7B8C, Pretendard 700, ~24px) on top, then body text (Pretendard 400, #0E1B2C, ~26px, line-height 1.6, may wrap to 2-3 lines): "AAP Clinical Practice Guideline (2011, reaffirmed) · NICE NG143 (2021) · Nelson Textbook of Pediatrics 21st ed · 대한소아청소년과학회". Below source box, app pitch (Pretendard 400, #6B7B8C, ~30px): "발열 기록 · 체중별 해열제 용량 자동 계산 → 소아과수첩 앱 (Google Play)." Below app pitch, handle line bold (Pretendard 700, #0E1B2C, ~40px): "@dr.soa_unnie" + small accent line below (Pretendard 400, #2C6E63, ~28px): "팔로우 = 응급 가이드 알림." Bottom CTA (Pretendard 700, #0E1B2C, ~32px): "도움됐다면 ❤️ + 저장 + 공유." Generous whitespace, left-aligned, magazine feel. Bottom footer: "✓ 소아청소년과 전문의 검수" + "09 / 09" in #6B7B8C. Use exact Korean spelling "열날 때" "꺼내" "보세요" "소아과수첩" "저장" "공유".
